title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026 | Interviews with key candidates and political leaders
content: A collection of interviews by ‘The Hindu’ with key candidates and political leaders as part of Kerala Assembly elections 2026 coverage

title: Assembly elections LIVE: 'Superstar of 2026 election' is DMK manifesto, says CM Stalin
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi is set to launch the BJP’s campaign for West Bengal Assembly elections from Cooch Behar today

title: Modi government not listening to anyone: Rahul flags functional problems of OSCs for women
content: What was the government's response? That everything is 'satisfactory'. If everything is indeed 'satisfactory', then why are reports of so many problems regarding OSCs continuing to surface? questions Congress leader Rahul Gandhi

title: Search operation launched after suspicious movement in J&K's Samba
content: A resident of Bedh Khad in the Darui area reported spotting three unidentified persons with one carrying a heavy backpack, moving along a dried-up stream under the cover of darkness.

title: NIMHANS review flags enduring impact of child suicides on parents, mental health professionals
content: The study finds that parents experience intense and prolonged grief marked by guilt, self-blame, and a persistent search for answers, while mental health professionals experience a parallel emotional burden

title: Amaranth, brick, coral, and 48 other shades of red
content: A mass wedding ceremony in India’s capital, supported financially by an NGO and endorsed by the Delhi government, is a relief from dowry and wedding expenses. Through conversations with brides, grooms, and their kin, Ashna Butani finds that though couples and families are happy to have broken out of the cycle of spending a chunk of their savings on a ceremony, the rituals reinforce endogamy and traditional expectations

title: Madhya Pradesh lodge collapse death toll rises to two; NDRF continues rescue ops
content: ‘Aggarwal Lodge', a building located near a bus stand in Kotma town, collapsed around 5.30 p.m. on Saturday (April 4, 2026), trapping several people in the vicinity

title: TVK chief Vijay files revised set of nominations in Perambur, Tiruchi East correcting discrepancies
content: In the revised set of nominations, Mr. Vijay has declared two cases pending against him — one at the Peravallur police station for allegedly violating election norms in the Kolathur Assembly seat, where he campaigned on March 30 after filing his nominations

title: T.N. Assembly election: discrepancies surface in affidavits filed by Vijay for Tiruchi East and Perambur
content: These are with respect to personal details, criminal disclosures, and asset declarations. The Tiruchi East affidavit includes details of movable assets of his wife, son, and daughter, that don’t figure in the Perambur one

title: Pakistan jibes become central to BJP’s Assam poll narrative
content: Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma has been attacking Congress leader Gaurav Gogoi over his alleged Pakistan connections, his latest barb was aimed at the mother of a candidate whom he accused of sympathising with ‘anti-national’ elements

title: Election Commission suspends four police officers over lapses at Suvendu Adhikari roadshow in Bhabanipur
content: Disciplinary action initiated against four officers; EC asks their positions to be filled by replacements immediately

title: Kerala Assembly polls: LDF’s manifesto vows to eradicate absolute poverty, hike welfare pensions to ₹3,000
content: Ruling front’s manifesto outlines a 60-point programme containing 950 proposals to create a ‘Nava Kerala’ (New Kerala), while seeking a mandate to continue ongoing development works

title: Families of AI171 crash victims seek release of black box data, write to PM
content: “We don't want money, we just want to know what happened," says Nilesh Purohit, who lost his 24-year-old son in the crash

title: Temples and precincts can’t be used for politics, says CM Revanth Reddy
content: At a review meeting on the development of Gnana Saraswati Temple in Basara on Saturday, the Chief Minister said that temples and their premises cannot be made political platforms and officials must ensure measures to curb such activities.

title: Gujarat HC bars AI use in decision-making, judgment drafting
content: AI cannot be used to author, generate, or substantially compose any judgment, final order, or binding legal ruling, even if subsequently reviewed by a judge, according to the policy document

title: GHMC faces resistance from shop keepers during demolition drive near Monda Market
content: During the demolition drive near Charminar, Member of Legislative Council (MLC) Mirza Rahmath Baig Quadri came in support of the shop owners, and started arguing with the police and GHMC staff aggressively.

title: Kerala Assembly Polls 2026: LDF, UDF and NDA in a no-holds barred battle for supremacy in south Kerala
content: In the battle for 42 constituencies spread across Thiruvananthapuram, Kollam, Pathanamthitta and Alappuzha districts, LDF and UDF are focussed on not yielding ground to the NDA, which is buoyed by the BJP’s ascendancy, chiefly in the Thiruvananthapuram Corporation, in the local body polls

title: Tremors spark panic in Alluri District of Andhra Pradesh
content: According to the National Center for Seismology, the source of the tremors was a 4.4-magnitude earthquake centered near the Koraput region of Odisha, specifically in the vicinity of Jeypore.

title: Buying black tickets for RCB matches? new m-ticket system could land you in trouble
content: The State expert committee set up to supervise the overhaul of the M. Chinnaswamy Stadium ensured that 80% of the match tickets were sold in the form of m-tickets

title: Experts slam India’s colonial mindset in tiger protection policy
content: Madhya Pradesh, a State with the country’s largest tiger population, recorded 55 tiger deaths last year, the highest in a single year since Project Tiger was launched in 1973

title: In Frames: A hearth of Sufism
content: The annual Zool festival in South Kashmir keeps a rich Sufi legacy alive, symbolising victory of light over darkness, while heralding spring after a harsh Himalayan winter

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: campaign trail heats up in Kundara as three major fronts intensify their reach-out programmes
content: Incumbent MLA P.C. Vishnunadh of UDF is banking on his track record, while LDF’s Sajikumar promises transformative projects. Robin Radhakrishnan of the NDA is advocating for radical change while pledging direct access to Prime Minister Modi if elected.

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: LDF, UDF in a tight fight in Kuttiyadi; NDA hoping to make a change
content: Incumbent MLA K.P. Kunhammed Kutty of the LDF is taking on Parakkal Abdulla of the UDF again; the NDA has fielded Ramadas Manaleri

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: Manalur constituency on the edge in a battle of titans
content: With no clear trend, the constituency braces for one of its fiercest electoral showdowns between UDF’s T. N. Prathapan, LDF’s C. Ravindranath, and BJP’s K.K. Aneesh Kumar

title: Odisha raises quota for STs, SCs; introduces reservation for OBCs in medical and technical education
content: Of the total 44,579 engineering seats in the State, the number for STs will increase from 5,349 to 10,030

title: Pinarayi slams Rahul for drawing equivalence between LDF and Hindutva forces in Chhattisgarh
content: Kerala Chief Minister says the Congress leader’s “brazenly misleading” statement smacks of an “impudence stemming from social and political illiteracy and ignorance”; he says the Congress’ “complacency and ideological ambiguity” in politically resisting Hindu majoritarian forces, including their trespasses on minorities, paved the way for the ascendancy of the Sangh Parivar-backed BJP in India

title: States are not Centre’s subordinates: Justice B.V. Nagarathna
content: Justice Nagarathna says the Centre ought to view the States as coordinates and federalism as a constitutional arrangement of co-equals

title: Artemis II | Mission moon
content: The U.S. has cast the programme to return American astronauts to the moon as part of a race against China, but Beijing views its mission differently

title: U.P. CM Yogi Adityanath pushes for zero dropout, appeals to society for ensuring no child is left out of school
content: U.P. C.M. says student dropout rate in U.P. has reduced from 19% before 2017 to just three percent; children receive free uniforms, sweaters, bags, books, socks and shoes

title: Following the ideals of Jagjivan Ram, Congress to secure justice for downtrodden, says party leaders
content: During the function, U.P. Congress also felicitated current and former Members of Parliament (MPs) and Members of Legislative Assembly (MLAs) belonging to the Scheduled Castes, as well as individuals from the Scheduled Castes who have performed exemplary work in social service

title: Rajasthan to host nationwide roadshows ahead of agritech meet
content: The initiative aims at engaging with investors, agritech firms, research institutions, startups and key stakeholders to ensure participation and attract investments to the agriculture sector

title: Snow in hills, rain in plains as western disturbance sweeps north India
content: Rains and hailstorms have continued to lash the northern States intermittently this week, with wheat growers in Punjab, Haryana and Rajasthan staring at major losses due to crop damage

title: Chandigarh grenade blast case solved, claims Punjab DGP
content: Five accused have been arrested; police recovered one hand grenade and one (point).30 bore Zigana pistol from their possession

title: What are the concerns over the FCRA Bill?
content: How does the Home Ministry regulate foreign donations to NGOs in India? What are the key changes proposed to the Foreign Contribution (Regulation) Amendment Bill, 2026? Why has the Opposition objected to the Bill and why was the Bill deferred? What is its current status?

title: Basavaraj Bommai blames Congress for delay in implementation of Upper Krishna Project
content: MP and Former Chief Minister Basavaraj Bommai has blamed the Congress party for the delay in implementation of the Upper Krishna Project

title: How did the ‘Amaravati Bill’ come into place?
content: Why has Amaravati been declared the sole capital of A.P.? Why did the A.P. Reorganisation Act need to be amended?

title: Close contest between three-time MLA and new face with family legacy
content: Among the key issues before the people is the long-pending demand of increased compensation for those who lost land to the Upper Krishna Project; another issue is the plan to expand the irrigated area for the implementation of Phase 3 of the project

title: ‘DMK far removed from its principles; law and order situation is concerning’
content: PMK leader Anbumani Ramadoss accuses Chief Minister M.K. Stalin of being influenced by a coterie of Ministers; he slams the DMK over a pending case in SC on making Tamil mandatory in educational institutions and the delay in caste census, asserts ‘like-minded parties’ have united to oust DMK

title: Find a fare balance for Namma Metro
content: BMRCL should lower prices till capacity utilisation is maximum, but it should not suffer losses; so government subsidy is welcome

title: Defence Ministry pushes indigenous design for development of 1,000-kg aerial bomb for IAF
content: At present, Mk-84 class general-purpose bombs are procured from foreign original equipment manufacturers and are in service with the IAF

title: T.N. CM Stalin, Union Minister clash over three-language formula ahead of T.N. polls
content: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister M.K. Stalin says Centre has failed to make Tamil mandatory in KVs or appoint sufficient Tamil teachers, Education Minister says DMK is creating barriers that deny youth the chance to become multilingual global leaders

title: Will launch probe into Karunanidhi’s death after coming back to power, says Palaniswami
content: He was responding to DMK president and Chief Minister M.K. Stalin’s contention that the AIADMK leader has no right or locus standi to comment on the latter’s relationship with his father at an election campaign the previous day

title: Villagers erupt in protest after elephant kills elderly woman in Tripura
content: The agitation came to an end following the intervention of senior police and district administration officials

title: Seats in government universities should be increased to pursue higher education: VIT Chancellor
content: Stressing the importance of faculty, G. Viswanathan notes that teachers contribute 90 per cent to the success of educational institutions, with the remaining 10 per cent coming from administration and infrastructure

title: Experts highlight high-growth opportunities in semiconductor industry
content: At a webinar titled ‘Electronics and semiconductor careers: skills, roles, and how to get started’ , speakers focused on how the semiconductor industry would shape the future of all industries

title: How Michigan, UConn won Saturday's Final Four -- and keys to Monday's title game
content: ESPN's college basketball crew breaks down what they saw in Indianapolis -- and what could decide the championship.

title: Not 1, not 2: Adell's 3 HR robberies save Angels
content: Angels outfielder Jo Adell robbed the Mariners of three home runs Saturday night, including a ninth-inning grab in which he crashed into the seats in the right-field corner to help preserve a 1-0 win.

title: U-M advances with historic beatdown of Arizona
content: Michigan's 18-point margin of victory over Arizona is tied for the largest in an NCAA men's tournament game between 1-seeds since 1979.

title: Jokic outduels Wemby in 'amazing' OT thriller
content: Nikola Jokic outdueled Victor Wembanyama in a clash of MVP candidates Saturday as the Nuggets extended their win streak to eight games.

title: UConn tops Illini, makes 3rd title game in 4 years
content: UConn defeated Illinois in the Final Four on Saturday to advance to its third national championship game in the past four years.

title: Lendeborg hobbled, vows to play for U-M in final
content: Michigan star Yaxel Lendeborg suffered a left MCL sprain and left ankle sprain in Saturday's win over Arizona, but team trainer Chris Williams told ESPN he is "very confident" the forward will play in Monday's title game.

title: Geno apologizes to South Carolina for outburst
content: UConn coach Geno Auriemma apologized to the South Carolina staff for his emotional outburst at Gamecocks coach Dawn Staley in the closing seconds of their Final Four matchup.

title: Sources: Lakers' Reaves (oblique) out 4-6 weeks
content: Lakers guard Austin Reaves has been diagnosed with a Grade 2 left oblique muscle injury and will be out for the remainder of the regular season.

title: Illinois rues misses after another Final Four loss
content: Illinois added another hard-luck loss in the Final Four, as an uncharacteristic performance from its offense sunk its hopes vs. UConn on Saturday.

title: 🤔 Geno better than postgame actions?
content: Geno Auriemma is a defining figure in women's basketball, which makes his behavior Friday night all the more disappointing.

title: Women's NCAA championship game predictions: South Carolina or UCLA -- and what will decide the title?
content: Dawn Staley's Gamecocks seek their third title in five seasons. UCLA is chasing its first NCAA championship.

title: Latest NBA buzz: What we know about Luka's hamstring injury
content: Here's what league insiders are talking about behind the scenes, including when Doncic might be able to return from his latest injury.

title: NHL playoff watch: Guide to all 15 games on Statement Saturday
content: More playoff spots (and eliminations) can be clinched around the league. Here's what to watch in each contest.

title: Welcome to Mullins Drive: How a small Indiana town is embracing its new March legend
content: The UConn freshman inked his name in Indiana basketball history. His hometown added it to street signs, too.

title: Who will be the best RBs in the NFL draft class? We gave projections and comps for top prospects
content: We have stat projections for the top running back prospects in the 2026 NFL draft class, from Jeremiyah Love to late-round sleepers.

title: Boxing results: Wilder edges Chisora on points, Riley wins cruiserweight title eliminator
content: ESPN has live updates of the heavyweight boxing clash between Derek Chisora and Deontay Wilder from London.

title: Deontay Wilder tells Anthony Joshua 'let's do it' -- the fight makes perfect sense
content: Deontay Wilder appeared to call out Anthony Joshua on Saturday, and it's a fight which makes perfect sense.

title: Three big trends from Portland, Toronto picks
content: The biggest (and, in some cases, surprising) picks for the Fire and Tempo had a few things in common.

title: Haaland hits long-awaited Man City hat trick as pressure piles on Liverpool's Slot
content: Erling Haaland's first Manchester City hat trick since August 2024 helped send his side to the FA Cup semifinals in a 4-0 thrashing over Liverpool.

title: Final NBA MVP (and ROY) straw poll: Here's who voters are picking to win
content: Can Wemby's late push unseat SGA? Tim Bontemps polls 100 NBA insiders for the latest MVP snapshot. Plus, a look at the race for top rookie.

title: End of the feature back? What the rise of running back tandems means for the NFL draft
content: Splitting time used to be a mark against rushers. With top NFL draft prospects coming from the same backfield, that might be changing.

title: With the Sabres' playoff berth, Jets stand alone with longest active playoff drought in North America
content: New York owns the longest playoff drought in major North American sports after Buffalo ended its streak at 14 seasons.

title: Who are the 39 best men's U21 players in the world?
content: For the eighth straight year, ESPN brings you our list of the game's next young stars aged 21 or under. Who is good enough to make it?

title: Transfer rumors, news: Man United, Man City pushing for Anderson
content: Manchester United and Manchester City are moving quickly to sign Nottingham Forest's Elliot Anderson. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Alvarez a top-10 bat? Ohtani wins Cy Young? Perdomo for real? Don't be surprised
content: Eric Karabell looks into the crystal ball to tell fantasy baseball managers what might come to pass in the not-too-distant future.

title: UP man killed serving in Russian army, kin allege coercive recruitment
content: A 22-year-old man from Rampur, serving in the Russian army, was killed in the Russia-Ukraine conflict. His family alleges he was coerced into military service after going abroad for work, with an audio clip suggesting his life was ruined. His body returned home, leaving his family devastated and seeking answers.

title: 'Small trailer, picture abhi baaki hai': MP Raghav Chadha shares 3rd video message for AAP
content: AAP MP Raghav Chadha responded to internal criticism regarding his representation of Punjab's issues in Parliament. In his third video message, he asserted that Punjab is more than a mere talking point, stating it is his home and his duty. Chadha indicated that more actions are forthcoming, with the message "Picture Abhi Baaki Hai."

title: Suspected ISIS operative arrested from Kushinagar in joint operation by UP ATS, Delhi Police
content: A suspected ISIS operative, Rizwan, was arrested in Kushinagar by UP ATS and Delhi Police. Previously jailed for terror activities and radicalizing youth, he allegedly reconnected with ISIS modules online after his release. Electronic devices seized are being examined for further leads.

title: Meta CTO’s message to engineers and college graduates looking to join technology industry
content: Meta's CTO, Andrew Bosworth, urged aspiring tech professionals to prioritize hands-on building over theoretical study. He emphasized immersing oneself in practical projects, from "vibe coding" with AI tools for software to using Raspberry Pi and Arduino for hardware.  Bosworth advocates for continuous experimentation and action to develop essential skills for the evolving tech landscape.

title: Why MS Dhoni will not play CSK vs RCB match in IPL 2026
content: Royal Challengers Bengaluru, fresh off a win, face a struggling Chennai Super Kings in a southern derby. CSK's woes are compounded by the absence of MS Dhoni, who is sidelined for the first two weeks with a calf strain. Despite his physical absence, head coach Stephen Fleming insists Dhoni's influence on the team remains strong.

title: 'Serious risk of radioactive contamination': Iran FM writes to UN over Bushehr nuclear strikes
content: Iran's foreign minister has alerted the UN to grave risks of radioactive contamination following recent US-Israeli strikes near the Bushehr nuclear power plant. A projectile near the facility killed one staff member, prompting IAEA concerns about escalating attacks near nuclear infrastructure and the potential for accidents.

title: Amid job cuts, Canadian billionaire Kevin O’Leary points out a good thing about AI layoffs
content: Kevin O'Leary, the Canadian billionaire, asserts that artificial intelligence is elevating human creativity, making artists and storytellers more valuable than ever. He highlights how compelling social media content, especially short-form videos, now commands significant salaries due to measurable customer acquisition. O'Leary believes AI is a powerful productivity tool, fostering new industries and opportunities across all economic sectors.

title: ‘Dhurandhar: The Revenge’ eyes Rs 1,600 crore worldwide
content: Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' continues its impressive box office run, nearing the Rs 1000 crore mark domestically. The spy thriller has grossed over Rs 1550 crore worldwide, with strong weekend performances bolstering its overall collection. The film is currently enjoying its third weekend in theaters.

title: US-Iran conflict: Middle East war sends US fuel prices soaring, surcharges kick in
content: Escalating Middle East tensions are driving up fuel costs in the US, impacting daily life and business operations.  Petrol prices have surged over a dollar, with diesel seeing an even steeper increase, prompting companies like Amazon and airlines to implement surcharges. Experts warn of broader economic repercussions and consumer price hikes as supply chain pressures mount.

title: Microsoft AI CEO Mustafa Suleyman: Microsoft still lacks the computing power
content: Microsoft AI CEO Mustafa Suleyman revealed the company currently lacks the computing power for the largest AI models, competing in the mid-class range. He outlined a roadmap for building internal compute capacity and self-sufficiency over the next few years, aiming to develop state-of-the-art AI systems and reduce reliance on external partners.

title: 'Archive this one': Ravi Shastri in awe of Riyan Parag's captaincy
content: Rajasthan Royals secured a thrilling six-run victory over Gujarat Titans, thanks to skipper Riyan Parag's astute captaincy.  Parag's bold decision to hand Jofra Archer the crucial penultimate over, influenced by Dhruv Jurel, proved pivotal.  Archer's disciplined bowling restricted Gujarat, allowing Tushar Deshpande to seal the win in the final over.  Former stars lauded Parag's composure and leadership.

title: Bleeding gums may signal more than oral disease: How gum health is linked to heart risk
content: Bleeding gums could be more than just a minor annoyance; they could hint at severe underlying health troubles such as heart disease or compromised kidney function. This early indicator, linked to ongoing inflammation, opens doors for bacteria to infiltrate the bloodstream, potentially harming crucial organs.

title: Teen killed as DJ vehicle overturns during Hanuman Janmotsav procession in Madhya Pradesh
content: Tragedy struck a Hanuman Janmotsav procession in Sagar's Makronia area when a DJ vehicle carrying revellers overturned. A 15-year-old boy lost his life, and several others were injured. Eyewitnesses reported youths dancing on the vehicle before it lost control. Locals bravely rescued the injured before authorities arrived and secured the scene.

title: Tank full, wallet empty? Hong Kong’s petrol prices worst hit amid Iran war
content: Global energy prices are soaring due to Middle East conflict, with Hong Kong experiencing the world's highest petrol costs.  Despite this, authorities assure supply stability, largely from mainland China.  The high prices, driven by duties and land costs, impact logistics and inflation, prompting some drivers to refuel across the border.

title: Raghav Chadha made to stand like rooster, beaten in ‘secret mansion’: Ex-AAP leader
content: A political row has erupted within the party following allegations against Raghav Chadha. Chadha has vehemently denied these accusations, labeling them a coordinated campaign. This public exchange of claims signifies an escalating internal divide within the party.

title: Candidates Chess: Vaishali, Divya Deshmukh save Indian blushes; Praggnanandhaa must act now
content: Javokhir Sindarov continues his dominant run in the FIDE Candidates Open section, widening his lead. In the Women's category, Indian players Vaishali Rameshbabu and Divya Deshmukh secured crucial wins, though their victories relied heavily on opponent errors. The Indian challenge in the Open section, led by Praggnanandhaa, lags significantly behind the leader.

title: 'Gates of hell will open': Iran rejects Trump's 'helpless' 48-hr ultimatum on Hormuz
content: Iran has rejected a 48-hour ultimatum from US President Donald Trump, who threatened to destroy the nation's essential infrastructure if a deal isn't reached. Trump's warning, issued via Truth Social, cited the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz as a key demand. This ultimatum follows recent diplomatic engagement and previous pauses on potential strikes.

title: ‘Drugged and raped': Hyderabad woman alleges forced conversion by husband, in-laws
content: she provided an outline of a harrowing experience involving deception, physical violence, financial exploitation, and religious coercion. The victim met the accused, Nawaz, when he approached her to rent a shop. She alleged he falsely claimed to have converted to Hinduism and changed his name to Navadurga to gain her trust.

title: Happy Easter Sunday: Top wishes to share with your friends and family
content: Easter Sunday marks a time of hope and renewal, celebrating Jesus Christ's resurrection. This central Christian event symbolizes victory over sin and death, offering believers eternal life. Families gather for services and feasts, embracing customs that blend ancient rites with Christian meaning, spreading messages of forgiveness and new beginnings.

title: Air India Ahmedabad plane crash families urge PM Modi to release black box data
content: Grieving families of the Air India flight crash victims have appealed to Prime Minister Modi for the release of black box data. Ten months after the tragedy that claimed 260 lives, they seek answers regarding the cause of the disaster. The families are demanding transparency, requesting either public disclosure or private sharing of the crucial cockpit and flight recorder information.

title: Handbrake not properly engaged? Elderly woman crushed to death by Thar in UP
content: A tragic accident in Farrukhabad, Uttar Pradesh, claimed the life of a 75-year-old woman. While closing a gate for an SUV, she was crushed against a wall when the vehicle unexpectedly rolled backward. CCTV footage captured the harrowing moments. Authorities suspect the handbrake may not have been fully engaged, leading to the fatal incident.

title: India makes first oil purchase from Iran in 7 years with no payment hurdle
content: Amid Middle East supply disruptions, Indian refiners have resumed Iranian crude oil purchases after a seven-year hiatus, securing their energy needs. The government confirmed no payment hurdles exist for these imports, assuring India's crude oil requirements for the coming months are fully met. This strategic shift diversifies sourcing amidst global supply chain challenges.

title: Sooryavanshi tipped for major role in BCCI’s make-or-break red-ball mission
content: India's cricket board is rebuilding its Test team. A new plan focuses on young players for the future. A four-day competition will feature 64 players under 25. This aims to create a strong pipeline of red-ball cricketers. Coaches and selectors will prioritize Test development. Emerging and India A teams will tour Sri Lanka for four-day games.

title: Raghav Chadha deleted social media posts critical of PM Modi, BJP: AAP
content: Delhi AAP chief Saurabh Bharadwaj accused MP Raghav Chadha of deleting past social media posts critical of PM Modi and the BJP. Bharadwaj claims Chadha has 'reshaped his public profile' by removing critical remarks, presenting a 'new, polished version'. This follows a public rift after Chadha's removal as AAP's deputy leader in Rajya Sabha.

title: Hormuz supply crunch: Rising energy prices impact roads, airlines and restaurants
content: Global energy prices are soaring due to the Middle East conflict and Strait of Hormuz issues. This is significantly impacting India's economy. Road construction costs are rising, and airlines face higher fuel expenses. Hotels and restaurants are also feeling the pinch with increased LPG prices. Businesses are adjusting to these escalating costs, with some considering price hikes.

title: Iran drone strike on US Embassy in Saudi Arabia hit CIA station: Report
content: A recent Iranian drone attack on the US Embassy in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, inflicted far more damage than initially reported, striking a CIA facility and causing extensive destruction. The incident, part of a wider regional escalation involving Iran and the US, saw multiple drones intercepted, highlighting Iran's growing capabilities and regional reach.

title: Southern derby at Chinnaswamy: In-form RCB face out-of-sorts CSK
content: The Southern Derby sees RCB, fresh off a dominant win, host a struggling CSK. RCB, rebuilt and title-winning, faces a transitional CSK that has faltered in recent seasons. With contrasting preparation times and a more settled RCB lineup, the match presents a significant challenge for the visitors.

title: Coach borrows Rs 10L to fire MP rural girls' team to national women's football league
content: Football coach Param Ashawar took a significant personal loan to fund his underprivileged girls' team, District Raisen Football Club, enabling their historic qualification for Tier 2 of the Indian Women's League. Despite financial burdens, the team's success, including a victory over Odisha FC, fuels his commitment to advancing women's football in Madhya Pradesh.

title: Tiger Woods faces legal heat as crash victim hires lawyer after DUI
content: Tiger Woods faces more pressure after Jeromy Bullard hired lawyer Jason Fagnano following their Florida crash. While no injuries occurred, legal action may grow. Woods already faces DUI-related charges. His past accidents, possible rehab trip to Switzerland, and support from Vanessa Trump have all added new layers to an already serious situation, as reported by TMZ and Daily Mail.

title: Giannis vs Bucks turns messy as NBA probes injury controversy
content: A major NBA dispute is unfolding involving the Milwaukee Bucks and star player Giannis Antetokounmpo. Antetokounmpo claims he is healthy, but the team states he is injured. This situation has sparked an NBA investigation into potential "tanking" by the Bucks to improve draft picks. Fans are siding with Antetokounmpo, raising concerns about his future with the team.

title: Stephen Curry, Ayesha Curry join $150b mogul in heartwarming move
content: Stephen Curry and Ayesha Curry have joined Warren Buffett in reviving his iconic charity lunch through a new auction titled “A Seat At The Table.” The initiative blends Buffett’s legacy in philanthropy with the Currys’ growing influence beyond basketball. With proceeds benefiting the Glide Foundation and Eat. Learn. Play. Foundation, the event aims to create meaningful change in underserved communities. Scheduled for June 24 in Omaha, the auction reflects a powerful collaboration focused on impact, purpose, and long-term community support.

title: Watch: Kuwait's ministries complex building targeted in 'hostile' drone attack
content: Kuwait's ministries complex and Shuwaikh oil sector were hit by a hostile drone attack on Sunday, which the finance ministry attributed to "unjust Iranian aggression." While significant material damage was reported, authorities confirmed no casualties. Kuwaiti air defenses intercepted incoming threats as part of Iran's ongoing offensive across the Gulf.

title: Watch: Trump claims ‘many of Iran’s military leaders’ killed in ‘massive’ strike; shares video
content: US President Donald Trump claims "many of Iran's military leaders" were "terminated" in a major Tehran strike, sharing explosion footage without specifics. This follows Iran's missile attacks on Gulf states, Iraq, and Israel, and the downing of a US F-15 jet. Both nations have exchanged threats and carried out attacks, raising concerns of war crimes.

title: Rohit Sharma scripts IPL history, surpasses MS Dhoni to...
content: Rohit Sharma scored 35 but made history by hitting his 51st six against Delhi Capitals, the most by an Indian against one IPL team, surpassing MS Dhoni. The milestone highlights his dominance despite a modest knock. He also neared 6000 runs for Mumbai Indians, while Chris Gayle still holds the overall record globally.

title: Security breach at NIT Silchar as male student enters girls’ hostel naked
content: In a bewildering turn of events at NIT Silchar, an MBA student was found wandering into the girls' hostel in a state of undress, sparking immediate alarm among residents. Witnesses suggest that the individual may have been under the influence of substances or grappling with mental health issues, managing to evade security protocols.

title: Opinion: Opinion | From Colombo To Dhaka  And Male, Pumps Are Running Dry And New Delhi Is Answering
content: The war in the Middle East has done in weeks what a decade of infrastructure diplomacy could not - it has made India's neighbours remember who answers the phone.

title: Pak Minister Khawaja Asif's "Kolkata" Shocker After Rajnath Singh's Warning
content: Rajnath Singh, on Thursday, warned any "misadventure" from India's neighbour, Pakistan, in the prevailing situation would invite an "unprecedented and decisive" action.

title: Iran War Starts Pinching US As Gas Prices, Transport Costs Surge
content: The average price of petrol in the US has increased to $4.09 a gallon on Friday, up more than one dollar from just before the war and the highest level since August 2022.

title: Special Forces, Dozens Of Planes: How US Rescued F15 Jet Crew From Iran
